dataset: Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 — Brain Tumour (BraTS 2016/2017)
source: Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 Brain Tumour (source: BRATS 2016 and 2017 datasets)
axial_selection: slice with maximum tumour area per case
label: binary tumour mask (any BraTS label > 0)
